title: L40 8LD, Biffa Waste Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/SP3930RZ/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Biffa Waste Services Limited   Installation name: Burscough Transfer Station   Permit number: EPR/SP3930RZ/V003   "
